name: vessica
description: Set up and operate hosted Vessica workspaces, repositories, sandboxes, and durable knowledge through the ves CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and drive hosted coding factories through ves.
interface.longDescription: Use the ves Go CLI to create a Railway-hosted Vessica workspace, attach repositories, generate engineering harnesses, dispatch cloud coding runs, retrieve shared knowledge, refine previews, and review evidence.
defaultPrompt: Set up Vessica in this repository.
Turn this request into a Vessica epic.
Show me the status of my Vessica runs.
What does Vessica remember about this repository?
Help me configure or troubleshoot Vessica.
